author: maxine--basel--kickoff-graph-command-0fa7
content: Plan: Add Graph variant to KickoffCommands in main.rs, create graph.rs module under kickoff/, wire dispatch in mod.rs. Phase 1: collect refs via discover_agents + git for-each-ref. Phase 2: build topology via git merge-base/rev-list. Phase 3: render ASCII graph. Support --all, --json, --no-pager flags.
